description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- perf(control): write goal state off the controller lock by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4891
- perf(desktop): gate legacy topic migration behind a per-dir marker by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4897
- chore: remove unused inspect package and redundant npm lockfile by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4919
- refactor(control): extract goal FSM into a goalMachine collaborator by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4918
- refactor(control): extract approval/ask bookkeeping into an approvalManager by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4922
- refactor(store): add a store package owning the session-sidecar layout by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4928
- refactor(control): introduce the SessionAPI driving port; migrate bot to it by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4931
- refactor(control): migrate serve and acp to the SessionAPI port by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4932
- refactor(control): migrate the cli TUI to the SessionAPI port by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4935
- refactor(desktop): migrate the App to the SessionAPI port by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4939
- Fix PE handoff and planner routing / 修复 PE 交接与规划路由 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4938
- Integrate desktop sidebar runtime fixes / 整合桌面侧边栏运行态修复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4942
- Support codebase-memory MCP auto-indexing / 支持 codebase-memory MCP 自动索引 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4951
- Remove MiMo built-in guidance / 移除 MiMo 内置引导 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4949
- Remove lazy MCP startup mode / 移除 MCP lazy 启动模式 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4961
- 会话级的 todo 列表被持久化保存了，即使清空也会被 relaod。 by @linze0721 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4959
- 兼容 ps7 by @linze0721 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4957
- Make running turns escapable after cancel / 取消后保持运行中任务可退出 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4975
- Preserve cancelled batch results / 保留取消批次结果 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4976
- Make agent step limits user-global / Agent 轮数上限仅按用户全局配置生效 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4979
- Make auto-plan user-level only / 自动计划仅按用户级配置生效 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4977
- fix(ui): 修复右侧面板分隔线间距和对话头部浅色模式背景 by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4985
- Integrate desktop shortcut improvements / 整合桌面快捷键改进 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5005
- style(desktop): add Creation tool flow visuals by @Li-Charles-One in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4974
- fix(desktop): add copy+remove fallback for session trash move on Windows by @liaoyl830 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4999
- fix(plugin): persist lazy MCP schema cache by @cyq1017 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4878
- fix(control): strip referenced context prefix for title generation by @liaoyl830 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4998
- feat(agent): add grace round when tool-call budget is exhausted by @eghrhegpe in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4869
- [codex] Attach workspace image refs to vision turns by @Surfire in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4737
- feat: add /reload-cmd command for hot-reloading custom slash commands by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5016
- Compact model switcher trigger / 精简模型切换按钮 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5018
New Contributors
- @linze0721 made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4959
- @liaoyl830 made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4999
- @Surfire made their first contribution in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4737
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.10.0...desktop-v1.11.0
